text.title: Guardrails Implementation Checklist
text.summary: Step-by-step checklist for implementing, testing, and deploying a production guardrails pipeline.

list.item: Install guardrails-ai and presidio: pip install guardrails-ai presidio-analyzer presidio-anonymizer
Define GuardrailConfig with thresholds at app startup
Wire pipeline.run() into the LLM call path
Verify GuardrailResult is returned on both safe and blocked paths
Implement validator as (output: str) -> (bool, str) — bool=is_valid, str=error message
Test validator with valid input, invalid input, and edge cases
Confirm exceptions surface as errors, not silent pass-throughs
Enable rate limiting on the guardrails endpoint
Log every violation with: timestamp, violation type, truncated input (100 chars max), metadata
Set up monitoring alerts on violation_count by type
Test failover: confirm app degrades gracefully if a guardrail check times out
Configure max-retries and human-escalation path for repeated injection attempts
Test injection signals: "ignore previous instructions", "you are now", "act as DAN"
Test PII detection: email, phone, SSN patterns
Test hallucination detection with a known-false claim vs. provided context
Benchmark: confirm guardrail pipeline adds less than 500ms for rule-based-only config
Load test: confirm no per-request object instantiation (pipeline is reused)
